[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111110 7
1 00001000 1
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 01011111 6
5 10011011 5
6 10110110 5
7 00010111 4

12 21 00101101 4
23 32 10100001 3
34 43 10011011 5 match 5
